tests.risk_if_missing: Users can trigger fill with an empty profile and get no meaningful guidance.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep the empty-form smoke fixture in regression.

tests.risk_if_missing: Real pages often mix pre-filled and empty values; overwrite behavior is unknown.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep the partially-filled regression fixture.

tests.risk_if_missing: Readonly or locked CRM fields can throw errors or misleadingly report success.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep the readonly and disabled regression fixture.

tests.risk_if_missing: Long-form notes fields may not map cleanly even though textarea is queried.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep textarea in the empty-form fixture.

tests.risk_if_missing: Many lead forms use selects for country, industry, or source; current package likely cannot fill them.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep the select fixture in smoke regression.

tests.risk_if_missing: Core contact data could fail silently.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep the current browser smoke assertion.

tests.risk_if_missing: Phone is explicitly mentioned in demand evidence and currently only verified on one fixture.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep the current browser smoke assertion and add alternate label variants.

tests.risk_if_missing: First/last name mapping is central to the wedge value proposition.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep the current browser smoke assertion.

tests.risk_if_missing: The extension may report success while doing nothing useful on unsupported forms.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep the no-match regression fixture.

tests.risk_if_missing: Extension action invocation is the only authorized fill trigger path.
tests.recommended_next_action: Retain the current smoke coverage.

tests.risk_if_missing: Any remote storage regression would break the privacy promise and review positioning.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep a static test that forbids network calls in popup code.

tests.risk_if_missing: Failures become opaque and users cannot tell whether anything happened.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep feedback verification in smoke regression.

tests.risk_if_missing: Without delete/reset, users cannot recover from bad saved data cleanly.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep popup profile management in smoke regression.

tests.risk_if_missing: Current fill path always writes values and could clobber operator edits.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep the overwrite-default-false regression fixture.

tests.risk_if_missing: Users may not trust the action if the popup does not confirm what happened clearly.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep popup feedback verification in smoke regression.

tests.test_name: email OTP login UI and protocol
tests.risk_if_missing: The commercial plugin could not complete the verified HWH email OTP auth path.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep SEND_OTP and VERIFY_OTP exposed only through the background membership runtime.

tests.risk_if_missing: HWH could misclassify plugin checkout sessions or miss installation metadata.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep CREATE_CHECKOUT sending source=chrome_extension plus installationId.

tests.test_name: successUrl is not a local unlock basis
tests.risk_if_missing: A redirect-only success page could be abused to unlock Pro without a verified webhook.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep Pro activation tied to webhook-derived entitlement refresh only.

tests.risk_if_missing: Paid users could fail to see active membership after the webhook writes entitlement.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep REFRESH_ENTITLEMENT as the user-visible post-payment recovery path.

tests.risk_if_missing: The core fill action could bypass free quota or Pro entitlement checks.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep guardPaidFeatureUsage before every fill execution path.

tests.test_name: free quota and quota exceeded path
tests.risk_if_missing: Free users could exceed the 10-fill limit or fail to understand the remaining quota.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep the 10-fill meter and 11th QUOTA_EXCEEDED smoke in the HWH handoff.

tests.risk_if_missing: Auth tokens could leak into visible UI or content script code.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep session handling in the background membership runtime.

tests.risk_if_missing: The extension could ship service-role, Waffo, merchant, or webhook secrets.
tests.recommended_next_action: Run monetization:security-scan before any upload approval.

tests.risk_if_missing: The candidate could imply production payment is enabled before live payment approval.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep production payment blocked until explicit live checkout verification.

recommended_next_tests: Keep the source=chrome_extension HWH smoke artifact linked to this candidate before any upload decision.
Repeat manual visual review of the membership panel and payment CTA.
Do not switch checkoutMode to live until production payment is explicitly approved.
